questionHtml: Discuss how the frequency of the radiation emitted by a black body can be used to estimate the temperature of the body.
markschemeHtml:
the (peak) wavelength of emitted em waves depends on temperature of emitter/reference to Wein’s Law

so frequency/color depends on temperature

[2 marks]

meta.title: Discuss how the frequency of the radiation emitted by a black body can be used to estimate the temperature of the body.
